☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Husk had no idea the day was going to turn out like this. It wasn’t supposed to turn out like this. The entire ordeal happened so fast he didn’t even have enough time to fully process what had actually just transpired.

He was sold off like some fucking pet. Apparently, Alastor was offered something and gave Husk’s soul as payment. The idea simply sickened the cat-demon as he was seen as nothing more than livestock. Even that was pushing it as it was clear that both of the deal makers didn’t seem to care whether Husk protested or not. ❞
